steps.title: Identify favorable outcomes
steps.content: There are $47$ participants with more than $110$ minutes of REM sleep out of $52$ participants total.

steps.title: Compute the probability
steps.content: The probability is favorable outcomes divided by total outcomes: $$\frac{47}{52}$$

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The correct value is $\frac{47}{52}$, so C is correct.
